steps.title: Spot the parallel structure
steps.content: The passage establishes a pattern: “One example is the word 'lasso.' It comes from the Spanish word lazo.” The next sentence begins with “Another example is 'rodeo.'” — the parallel marker Another signals that the blank should follow the same structure.

steps.title: Match the pronoun to the word being described
steps.content: It is the correct pronoun for a non-human noun (the word “rodeo”). The other three choices—Someone, She, and He—all refer to people, which contradicts the context of discussing a word's origin. That matches choice A — A is correct.
